inputs.label: Current Weight
inputs.businessContext: Current body weight of the individual in kilograms.

inputs.label: Goal Weight
inputs.businessContext: Target weight to achieve in kilograms.

inputs.label: Timeframe
inputs.businessContext: Number of weeks over which the weight change is planned.

inputs.label: Activity Level
inputs.businessContext: Physical activity factor (1.2 = sedentary, 1.375 = light exercise, 1.55 = moderate, 1.725 = heavy, 1.9 = athlete).
